message:
test(tui): add layout hysteresis/truncation and icons agent/category tests

Layout: TierForWidthWithHysteresis boundary tests, TruncateWidth,
TruncateWidthDefault, TruncateMiddle, TruncateMiddleWidth (49.4% -> 88.3%).

Icons: AgentIcon all agent types, CategoryIcon all categories,
StatusIcon, IsASCII, SetDefault/Current, WithFallback edge cases,
Detect with nerd/legacy env vars (37.7% -> 68.1%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
